preregistered_question: is the Sec 15.5 criticality confound robust or fragile?
verdict: CONFOUND ROBUST: among genuinely critical generators (p>1) the stratified differential is reproduced (D >= half the gated signal 1.22) in 15/24 cells (62%), across feedback and read-out noise, strengthening with criticality. Non-critical control (p=1) gives D<=0.012 ~ the additive null 0.010, validating the statistic. Sec 15.5's concession is ROBUST -- the gating test is thoroughly confounded by criticality, so the defensible contribution of CBRA is the negative/eliminative arm, not detection. This corrects rather than confirms the naive gating test, exactly as the paper states.
